title: Tracking order number. Need help!
excerpt: For each job, I need to attach a work order number to that specific order, and it can’t change. Auto number would be great, but it changes when the job moves throughout the board. Our work orders are currently in the 9,0…

posts.author: dcowan (Dalton Cowan)
posts.cookedHtml: For each job, I need to attach a work order number to that specific order, and it can’t change. Auto number would be great, but it changes when the job moves throughout the board. Our work orders are currently in the 9,000’s so I would like it to pick up where we left off. If there’s any way around this by creating a formula or something else, please let me know!

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Check out the Auto ID app on the marketplace.

posts.author: dcowan (Dalton Cowan)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the reply! Are you meaning the column center? That auto id gives it a randomized number and I definitely need something that I can customize to some degree… If this isn’t what your talking about, I can’t find anything else with auto id.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: I was actually referring to the AutoID app in the marketplace. Here is the link to the app - https://monday.com/marketplace/17

posts.author: dcowan (Dalton Cowan)
posts.cookedHtml: You rock. That will work perfectly… Thank you!
